title: Chone heterophylla
intro: Chone heterophylla, also known as Chone tree or Copal Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can aid in reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Chone heterophylla include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Chone heterophylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, as well as to address specific health concerns such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
